en: And he wrote the best songs, but my all-time favorite, it's...
ko: 그는 최고의 노래를 썼는데, 내가 제일 좋아하는 건...

en: ♪ Remember me ♪ ♪ Though I have to say goodbye ♪
♪ Remember me ♪ ♪ Don't let it make you cry ♪ ♪ For even if I'm far away ♪
♪ I hold you in my heart ♪ ♪ I sing a secret song to you ♪ ♪ Each night we are apart ♪
♪ Remember me ♪ ♪ Though I have to travel far ♪ ♪ Remember me ♪
♪ Each time you hear a sad guitar ♪ ♪ Know that I'm with you ♪
♪ The only way that I can be ♪
♪ Until you're in my arms again ♪ [Miguel] He lived the kind of life you'd dream about.
when he was crushed by a giant bell.
I want to be just like him.
